virtual void Reset()

SetFormatted(bool)

Writes 'pretty' formatting on or off.

virtual void SetFormatted(bool Value)

Parameters

Value bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetIndent(int)

Writes indent for 'pretty' formatting. Default is 2.

virtual void SetIndent(int Value)

Parameters

Value int

Starts an array.

Name string

Sample Snippet

StartObject(string)

Starts writing an object.

virtual void StartObject(string Name)

Parameters

Name string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Stream

Obtains underlying stream. If WriteTo() is not called yet, will return NULL. Also will return NULL if WriteToString() was called.

virtual IStream Stream { get; }

Returns

IStream

WriteRawString(string, string)

Writes a raw property without any processing. Use to insert JSON sub-object or sub-array strings only.

virtual void WriteRawString(string Name, string Value)

Parameters

Name string
Value string

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteRawStringVal(string)

Writes a raw value without any processing. Use to insert JSON sub-object or sub-array strings only.

virtual void WriteRawStringVal(string Value)

Parameters

Value string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Writes Raw UTF8 String

propname string
utf8String byte
Size uint
